title: TW8 9HF, Day Group Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/BB3232RX/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: Day Group Limited   Installation name: Brentford Aggregate Materials Recycling Facility   Permit number: EPR/BB3232RX/V005   "
